mapper.insert: SELECT SEQ_USER_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL INSERT INTO USERS ( USER_ID, LOGIN_ID, EMAIL, PASSWORD, NICKNAME, PROFILE_IMAGE, STATUS, IS_VERIFIED, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginId}, #{email}, #{password}, #{nickname}, #{profileImage}, 'ACTIVE', #{isVerified} , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
INSERT INTO SOCIAL_ACCOUNTS (social_id, user_id, provider, provider_id) VALUES (SEQ_SOCIAL_ID.NEXTVAL, #{userId}, #{provider}, #{providerId})

SELECT SEQ_ACCOUNT_ID.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO USER_ACCOUNTS (ACCOUNT_ID, USER_ID, BANK_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, BALANCE, IS_PRIMARY, PAYMENT_PASSWORD) VALUES (#{accountId}, #{userId}, #{bankCode}, #{accountNumber}, #{balance}, #{isPrimary}, #{paymentPassword})
mapper.select: SELECT u.*, p.name, p.phone_number, p.birth_date FROM USERS u LEFT JOIN USER_PRIVACY p ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE u.email = #{email}
SELECT u.*, p.ci, p.phone_number FROM USERS u JOIN USER_PRIVACY p ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE p.ci = #{ci}

SELECT u.*, p.name, p.phone_number, p.birth_date, s.social_id, s.user_id as social_user_id, s.provider, s.provider_id FROM USERS u JOIN USER_PRIVACY p ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN SOCIAL_ACCOUNTS s ON u.user_id = s.user_id WHERE p.phone_number = #{phone}

SELECT u.*, p.name, p.phone_number, p.birth_date, s.social_id, s.user_id as social_user_id, s.provider, s.provider_id FROM USERS u LEFT JOIN USER_PRIVACY p ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN SOCIAL_ACCOUNTS s ON u.user_id = s.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}

SELECT u.*, p.name, p.phone_number, p.birth_date, s.social_id, s.user_id as social_user_id, s.provider, s.provider_id FROM USERS u LEFT JOIN USER_PRIVACY p ON u.user_id = p.user_id LEFT JOIN SOCIAL_ACCOUNTS s ON u.user_id = s.user_id WHERE u.login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USERS WHERE login_id = #{loginId}
SELECT u.user_id, u.email, u.nickname, p.name, p.phone_number, p.birth_date FROM USERS u JOIN USER_PRIVACY p ON u.user_id = p.user_id WHERE u.user_id = #{userId}
SELECT * FROM SOCIAL_ACCOUNTS WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND provider = #{provider}

SELECT UA.ACCOUNT_ID as accountId, UA.USER_ID as userId, UA.BANK_CODE as bankCode, B.BANK_NAME as bankName, UA.ACCOUNT_NUMBER as accountNumber, UA.BALANCE, UA.IS_PRIMARY as isPrimary, UA.STATUS, UA.CUSTOMER_UID FROM USER_ACCOUNTS UA LEFT JOIN BANKS B ON UA.BANK_CODE = B.BANK_CODE WHERE UA.USER_ID = #{userId} AND UA.IS_PRIMARY = 'Y' AND UA.STATUS = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT UA.ACCOUNT_ID as accountId, UA.USER_ID as userId, UA.BANK_CODE as bankCode, B.BANK_NAME as bankName, UA.ACCOUNT_NUMBER as accountNumber, UA.BALANCE, UA.IS_PRIMARY as isPrimary, UA.STATUS FROM USER_ACCOUNTS UA LEFT JOIN BANKS B ON UA.BANK_CODE = B.BANK_CODE WHERE UA.USER_ID = #{userId} AND UA.STATUS = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY UA.IS_PRIMARY DESC, UA.ACCOUNT_ID ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE USER_PRIVACY SET NAME = #{name}, PHONE_NUMBER = #{phone}, BIRTH_DATE = #{birth}, UPDATED_AT = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE USER_ACCOUNTS SET IS_PRIMARY = 'N' WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
